title: Crispy Thai Naan
description: A delicious fusion of crispy fried naan and Thai flavors, perfect for a snack or appetizer.
instructions: Preheat the oil in a deep frying pan to 350°F (180°C).
Cut the naan bread into bite-sized pieces.
In a bowl, mix together curry paste, fish sauce, soy sauce, and sesame oil.
Dip each naan piece into the curry mixture, coating both sides.
Fry the coated naan pieces in batches until crispy and golden brown.
Drain the fried naan on paper towels.
Serve hot with your favorite dipping sauce.
